steps.title: Read the entries
steps.content: The table gives the task times $8$, $5$, $12$, $10$, and $10$ minutes.

steps.title: Calculate the mean
steps.content:
Add the values and divide by the number of tasks:

$$\frac{8+5+12+10+10}{5}=\frac{45}{5}=9$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: A calculator can compute the mean directly from the five table entries. The answer is B.
